sql_array: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_name VARCHAR(100), password VARCHAR(100), geom GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO users (id, user_name, password, geom) VALUES (1, 'user1', 'password1', bif:st_geomFromText('POINT(10 10)', 4326));
INSERT INTO users (id, user_name, password, geom) VALUES (2, 'user2', 'password2', bif:st_geomFromText('POINT(20 20)', 4326));
INSERT INTO users (id, user_name, password, geom) VALUES (3, 'user3', NULL, bif:st_geomFromText('POINT(30 30)', 4326));
SELECT user_name FROM users WHERE user_name = 'user1' AND bif:st_intersects(geom, bif:st_geomFromText('POINT(10 10)', 4326));
SELECT user_name FROM users WHERE user_name IS NOT NULL AND bif:st_intersects(geom, (SELECT bif:st_geomFromText('POINT(10 10)', 4326)));

SELECT user_name, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY (CASE WHEN password IS NULL THEN 'NULL Password' ELSE 'Valid Password' END)) as password_status_count FROM users GROUP BY user_name HAVING password_status_count > 1;
SELECT user_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u2 WHERE bif:st_intersects(u2.geom, geom)) as intersection_count FROM users u1 WHERE user_name = 'user1';
UPDATE users SET password = user_set_password(user_name, 'new_password!123') WHERE user_name = 'user1';
SELECT bif:st_intersects(a.geom, b.geom) FROM users a JOIN users b ON a.id != b.id WHERE a.password IS NOT NULL AND b.password IS NULL;
UPDATE users SET password = user_set_password(user_name, 'short') WHERE LENGTH(password) < 8;
SELECT * FROM users WHERE bif:st_intersects(geom, (SELECT bif:st_geomFromText('POINT(15 15)', 4326) WHERE TRUE));
INSERT INTO users (id, user_name, password, geom) VALUES (4, 'user4', 'password3', bif:st_geomFromText('POINT(NA 50)', 4326));
CREATE TABLE temp_users AS SELECT * FROM users WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
SELECT user_name FROM temp_users WHERE bif:st_intersects(geom, (SELECT bif:st_geomFromText('LINESTRING(0 0, 10 10)', 4326)));
DELETE FROM users WHERE bif:st_intersects(geom, (SELECT bif:st_geomFromText('POLYGON((5 5, 15 5, 15 15, 5 15, 5 5))', 4326)));
